steps.title: Spot the causal connection
steps.content: The strongest signal is the causal link in “made it all the more exciting”—the author is clearly using scarcity to explain the discovery's importance.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The phrase refers to the challenging situation mentioned earlier—the rarity of plant-based artifacts—that frames the discovery's significance.
The other options wrongly treat it as suggesting researcher failure, describing discovery uncertainty, or distinguishing artifact types.
This matches choice D — D is correct.
